sectionLabelZh: 主线一｜前沿研究与能力边界
sectionLabelEn: Thread 1 | Frontier research and capability shifts
titleZh: Google 想把心血管早筛做成偏远地区也能用的 AI 基础服务
titleEn: How AI is helping improve heart health in rural Australia
briefTitleZh: Google 想把心血管早筛做成偏远地区也能用的 AI 基础服务
briefTitleEn: How AI is helping improve heart health in rural Australia
kickerZh: Google · 前沿研究与能力边界
kickerEn: Google · Frontier research and capability shifts
summaryZh: Google放出了一项围绕数据集的研究型更新，指向的是推动能力边界继续外扩。这条消息值得看，不只是因为它新，而是因为它把最近这波行业主线又往前推了一截…
summaryEn: Google published a research-led update around dataset, aimed at pushing the capability frontier outward. What makes this worth following is that it pushes the broader industry arc a little further forward…
deckZh: Google放出了一项围绕数据集的研究型更新，指向的是推动能力边界继续外扩。
deckEn: Google published a research-led update around dataset, aimed at pushing the capability frontier outward.
narrativeZh: Google放出了一项围绕数据集的研究型更新，指向的是推动能力边界继续外扩。这条消息值得看，不只是因为它新，而是因为它把最近这波行业主线又往前推了一截。
文中最值得记的一处细节是：Supported by a $1 million AUD investment from Google Australia’s Digital… 研究型更新不一定会马上产品化，但它能提示下一阶段能力边界正在往哪边移动。
如果把它放回这几周的节奏里看，更值得追的是它会不会从展示走向默认能力。要看后续是否出现复现、开源实现、API 化，或者被头部产品吸收进默认能力。
narrativeEn: Google published a research-led update around dataset, aimed at pushing the capability frontier outward. What makes this worth following is that it pushes the broader industry arc a little further forward.
The most useful detail in the piece is this: Supported by a $1 million AUD investment from Google Australia’s Digital Future Initiative (DFI)… Research updates do not always become products quickly…
Placed in the context of the past few weeks, the bigger question is whether this moves from a signal to a default capability. The next step to watch is replication, open implementation, API exposure…
whatChangedZh: Google放出了一项围绕数据集的研究型更新，指向的是推动能力边界继续外扩。
whatChangedEn: Google published a research-led update around dataset, aimed at pushing the capability frontier outward.
whyItMattersZh: 研究型更新不一定会马上产品化，但它能提示下一阶段能力边界正在往哪边移动。
whyItMattersEn: Research updates do not always become products quickly, but they often tell you where the capability frontier is starting to bend.
watchNextZh: 要看后续是否出现复现、开源实现、API 化，或者被头部产品吸收进默认能力。
watchNextEn: The next step to watch is replication, open implementation, API exposure, or absorption into mainstream products.
evidenceBulletsZh: Supported by a $1 million AUD investment from Google Australia’s Digital Future Initiative (DFI)…
Supported by the DFI, SISU Health plans to conduct over 50,000 new health screenings in remote areas.
A one million dollar investment from Google Australia's Digital Future Initiative supports this program.
evidenceBulletsEn: Supported by a $1 million AUD investment from Google Australia’s Digital Future Initiative (DFI)…
Supported by the DFI, SISU Health plans to conduct over 50,000 new health screenings in remote areas.
A one million dollar investment from Google Australia's Digital Future Initiative supports this program.
impactZh: 要看后续是否出现复现、开源实现、API 化，或者被头部产品吸收进默认能力。
impactEn: The next step to watch is replication, open implementation, API exposure, or absorption into mainstream products.
bodySummary: How AI is helping improve heart health in rural Australia We’re partnering with leading Australian health organizations to bring new AI tools to regional communities. This project helps identify heart health risks early, making proactive care possible for more people. Head of Strategic Health Solutions, Asia-Pacific Google is partnering with Australian health organizations to improve heart health in rural areas…

sectionLabelZh: 主线二｜Agent 与开发者工具
titleZh: NVIDIA AI-Q 登顶 DeepResearch Bench，Agent 工程开始卷长链路稳定性
titleEn: How NVIDIA AI-Q Reached \#1 on DeepResearch Bench I and II
briefTitleZh: NVIDIA AI-Q 登顶 DeepResearch Bench，Agent 工程开始卷长链路稳定性
briefTitleEn: How NVIDIA AI-Q Reached \#1 on DeepResearch Bench I and II
kickerZh: Hugging Face · Agent 与开发者工具
kickerEn: Hugging Face · Agents and developer tooling
summaryZh: Hugging Face把围绕上下文窗口、开源的东西真正放了出来，重点不只是“开源”两个字，而是让外部生态更容易复用、验证和接着往下搭。 Hugging Face想证明的不是模型更聪明，而是 agent 终于更像能进生产环境的工具…
summaryEn: Hugging Face opened up work around context window and open source, making it easier for the wider ecosystem to inspect, reuse, and build on…
deckZh: Hugging Face把围绕上下文窗口、开源的东西真正放了出来，重点不只是“开源”两个字，而是让外部生态更容易复用、验证和接着往下搭。
deckEn: Hugging Face opened up work around context window and open source, making it easier for the wider ecosystem to inspect, reuse, and build on.
narrativeZh: Hugging Face把围绕上下文窗口、开源的东西真正放了出来，重点不只是“开源”两个字，而是让外部生态更容易复用、验证和接着往下搭。 Hugging Face想证明的不是模型更聪明，而是 agent 终于更像能进生产环境的工具。
文中最值得记的一处细节是：- Then we generated ~80k trajectories for the full 工作流 using the op… 换句话说，行业现在卷的已经不是谁更会回答，而是谁更能把能力接进现有软件和流程。
接下来真正要看的，是这类能力会不会变成默认配置，而不是只存在于少数标杆案例里。后续要看它是否被嵌进真实产品和开发者工作流，以及生态是否围绕它形成新的分发与集成方式。
narrativeEn: Hugging Face opened up work around context window and open source, making it easier for the wider ecosystem to inspect, reuse, and build on. Hugging Face is making the case that the next battle is not smarter chat…

The most useful detail in the piece is this: - Then we generated ~80k trajectories for the full workflow using the open-sourced GPT-OSS-120B model. In other words, the race is no longer just about who answers well…
What matters next is whether this becomes default product plumbing rather than a showcase reserved for a few strong case studies…
whatChangedZh: Hugging Face把围绕上下文窗口、开源的东西真正放了出来，重点不只是“开源”两个字，而是让外部生态更容易复用、验证和接着往下搭。
whatChangedEn: Hugging Face opened up work around context window and open source, making it easier for the wider ecosystem to inspect, reuse, and build on.
whyItMattersZh: 行业竞争点正在从“聊天回答得好不好”转向“能不能稳定接进软件、工具链和自动化流程”，这决定了真正的生产力入口。
whyItMattersEn: The competition is moving from chat quality to whether models can sit inside software, tooling, and automation without breaking the workflow around them.
watchNextZh: 后续要看它是否被嵌进真实产品和开发者工作流，以及生态是否围绕它形成新的分发与集成方式。
watchNextEn: What matters next is whether these ideas become default plumbing inside products and developer stacks, not just good demos.
evidenceBulletsZh: - Then we generated ~80k trajectories for the full 工作流 using the open-sourced GPT-OSS-120B model.
For the 基准测试 submission, a fine-tuned Nemotron 3 drives the researcher…
Custom Middleware for Long-Horizon Reliability Each agent and subagent interleaves LLM and tool calls across many steps…
evidenceBulletsEn: - Then we generated ~80k trajectories for the full workflow using the open-sourced GPT-OSS-120B model.
For the benchmark submission, a fine-tuned Nemotron 3 drives the researcher, which processes 4x more tokens than the planner and orchestrator combined.
Custom Middleware for Long-Horizon Reliability Each agent and subagent interleaves LLM and tool calls across many steps (often 32+).
impactZh: 后续要看它是否被嵌进真实产品和开发者工作流，以及生态是否围绕它形成新的分发与集成方式。
impactEn: What matters next is whether these ideas become default plumbing inside products and developer stacks, not just good demos.
bodySummary: How NVIDIA AI-Q Reached #1 on DeepResearch Bench I and II Enterprise + Article Published March 12, 2026 - Contributors : Raja Biswas, Divyansh Jain, Ivan Sorokin, Alessio Devoto, Chantal D Gama Rose, Ajay Thorve, David Austin, Jean-Francois Puget NVIDIA AI-Q deep research agent recently achieved first place on both DeepResearch Bench (55.95) and DeepResearch Bench II (54.50)…

sectionLabelZh: 主线三｜Agent 与开发者工具
titleZh: Rakuten 用 Codex 把修复速度拉快，Agent 工具开始交付业务指标
titleEn: Rakuten fixes issues twice as fast with Codex
briefTitleZh: Rakuten 用 Codex 把修复速度拉快，Agent 工具开始交付业务指标
briefTitleEn: Rakuten fixes issues twice as fast with Codex
kickerZh: OpenAI · Agent 与开发者工具
summaryZh: OpenAI给出了一篇围绕Agent 工作流与开发工具的实践拆解，重点不在概念，而在它怎么进真实工作流。 这类案例最有意思的地方，是它已经不再停留在“开发者喜欢不喜欢”，而是开始拿 MTTR、评审效率、CI/CD 这类业务指标说话。 目前能确认的公开信号是：Rakuten uses Codex…
summaryEn: OpenAI published a hands-on account of agent workflows and developer tooling, with the emphasis on how it behaves in a real workflow rather than in abstract… The clearest public signal so far is this: Rakuten uses Codex…
deckZh: OpenAI给出了一篇围绕Agent 工作流与开发工具的实践拆解，重点不在概念，而在它怎么进真实工作流。
deckEn: OpenAI published a hands-on account of agent workflows and developer tooling…
narrativeZh: OpenAI给出了一篇围绕Agent 工作流与开发工具的实践拆解，重点不在概念，而在它怎么进真实工作流。 这类案例最有意思的地方，是它已经不再停留在“开发者喜欢不喜欢”，而是开始拿 MTTR、评审效率、CI/CD 这类业务指标说话。
目前能确认的公开信号是：Rakuten uses Codex, the coding agent from OpenAI, to ship software faste… 换句话说，行业现在卷的已经不是谁更会回答，而是谁更能把能力接进现有软件和流程。
接下来真正要看的，是这类能力会不会变成默认配置，而不是只存在于少数标杆案例里。后续要看它是否被嵌进真实产品和开发者工作流，以及生态是否围绕它形成新的分发与集成方式。
narrativeEn: OpenAI published a hands-on account of agent workflows and developer tooling, with the emphasis on how it behaves in a real workflow rather than in abstract…

The clearest public signal so far is this: Rakuten uses Codex, the coding agent from OpenAI, to ship software faster and safer, reducing MTTR 50%… In other words, the race is no longer just about who answers well…
What matters next is whether this becomes default product plumbing rather than a showcase reserved for a few strong case studies…
whatChangedZh: OpenAI给出了一篇围绕Agent 工作流与开发工具的实践拆解，重点不在概念，而在它怎么进真实工作流。
whatChangedEn: OpenAI published a hands-on account of agent workflows and developer tooling, with the emphasis on how it behaves in a real workflow rather than in abstract.
whyItMattersZh: 行业竞争点正在从“聊天回答得好不好”转向“能不能稳定接进软件、工具链和自动化流程”，这决定了真正的生产力入口。
whyItMattersEn: The competition is moving from chat quality to whether models can sit inside software, tooling, and automation without breaking the workflow around them.
watchNextZh: 后续要看它是否被嵌进真实产品和开发者工作流，以及生态是否围绕它形成新的分发与集成方式。
watchNextEn: What matters next is whether these ideas become default plumbing inside products and developer stacks, not just good demos.
evidenceBulletsZh: Rakuten uses Codex, the coding agent from OpenAI, to ship software faster and safer, reducing MTTR 50%…
evidenceBulletsEn: Rakuten uses Codex, the coding agent from OpenAI, to ship software faster and safer, reducing MTTR 50%, automating CI/CD reviews…
impactZh: 后续要看它是否被嵌进真实产品和开发者工作流，以及生态是否围绕它形成新的分发与集成方式。
